[@microsoft/fast-element](../fast-element/index.html) &gt; [ElementController](../fast-element.elementcontroller/index.html) &gt; [isPrerendered](../fast-element.elementcontroller.isprerendered/index.html)

## ElementController.isPrerendered property

Resolves `true` when the element had an existing shadow root (from SSR or declarative shadow DOM) at connect time, `false` otherwise.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly isPrerendered: Promise<boolean>;
```
